title: White dog introduction
goal: Establish the before state: a calm white dog in a minimal premium setting.

title: Product moment
goal: Show the dog food as the catalyst and make the eating action unmistakable.

title: Transformation
goal: Capture the magical change from white dog to black dog in a smooth, visually elegant transition.

title: Black dog reveal
goal: Present the finished after state as a clean hero image that confirms the transformation.
